title: ECG_Julia: An open, modular Julia implementation of the explicitly correlated Gaussian (ECG) method
description: Open, modular implementation in the Julia programming language of the variational method of explicitly correlated Gaussians (ECGs) for non-relativistic, finite-nuclear-mass atomic and molecular bound-state calculations, including fully non-Born-Oppenheimer (non-BO) calculations in which nuclei and electrons are treated on the same footing. See the accompanying paper (related identifier below) and the repository README.
